name: pr-review-fix-decomposition
description: PR review fix workflow: decompose review findings into non-overlapping file-area builders (hooks vs modules), have lead self-verify diffs before merge_ready, coordinator merges after explicit merge_ready signal. Worked well for 8 findings across 11 files with 2 builders.
ov merge fails with 'all tiers failed' when working tree has unstaged .mulch changes
resolution: Commit unstaged mulch files first (git add .mulch/ && git commit), then retry ov merge — auto-resolve handles the append-only jsonl conflict cleanly.
